ddls:
CREATE TABLE "torrents" (
  "torrent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each torrent */,
  "torrent_name" TEXT /* Name of the torrent */,
  "added" TEXT /* Date and category when the torrent was added */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the torrent in MB */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Number of seeders */,
  "leech" INTEGER /* Number of leechers */,
  "health" TEXT /* Health status of the torrent */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the content belongs to */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content the torrent is associated with */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the torrent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the torrent was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("torrent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_torrents_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_torrents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_torrents_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES content_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the content was uploaded */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the content was last modified */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating of the content */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the content (e.g., HEV, mp4) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the content (e.g., 720p, 1080p) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the content */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* File path to the thumbnail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user rating the content */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value (e.g., 4.5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User comment on the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the version */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the version (e.g., HEV, mp4) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the version (e.g., 720p, 1080p) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred category */,
  "content_format" TEXT /* Preferred content format (e.g., HEV, mp4) */,
  "content_resolution" TEXT /* Preferred content resolution (e.g., 720p, 1080p) */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user receives email notifications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_reviews_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cdn_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being delivered */,
  "cdn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CDN */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* HTTP response code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cdn_logs_cdn_id FOREIGN KEY ("cdn_id") REFERENCES cdn_config ("cdn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cdn_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cdn_config" (
  "cdn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CDN */,
  "cdn_name" TEXT /* Name of the CDN */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the CDN */,
  "base_url" TEXT /* Base URL of the CDN */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CDN was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CDN was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cdn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, upload) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
